sizing_rule.note: Set stop losses at 2.0 ATR multiple; target 3:1 profit-to-loss ratio; account for 0.25% transaction cost buffer; halt or reassess after 3 consecutive stops to prevent cumulative losses exceeding profit targets. Core R-multiple discipline with drawdown protection trigger.

source_rule_text: A trader should set protective stop losses carefully by accounting for transaction costs and maximum acceptable loss per trade, calibrated to personal objectives and temperament, to avoid cumulative losses that exceed profit targets.
